species: we recently described and characterized Tre23, a toxin domain fused to a T6SS-associated Rhs protein in Photorhabdus laumondii, Rhs1.
sample_source: The Rhs1-EagR complex was purified from E. coli overproducing FLAG-tagged Rhs1 and Strep-tagged EagR...
cell_line: E. coli DH5α strain was used for cloning and E. coli BL21(DE3) for protein production and purification.
strain: P. luminescens subsp. laumondii TTO1 DNA was used as the template for cloning.
